evals.prompt: Our competitor keeps showing up in Google AI Overviews when people search for our category and we don't. How do we fix this?
evals.expected_output: Should explain how AI Overviews select content. Should recommend auditing which queries trigger AI Overviews in the category. Should recommend question-and-answer structure, structured data (FAQ schema), and comprehensive topic coverage. Should recommend analyzing competitor content that is being cited to identify structural patterns. Should provide specific page-level and schema recommendations.
assertions: Explains how AI Overviews select content
